channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Michael B. Jordan takes the lead on Polymarket for Oscars Best Actor
item.description: "Sinners" star Jordan's odds of winning the Best Actor honors at next week's Academy Awards were only 10% on March 1, hours before he won SAG's top male actor award.

item.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 vs xAI Grok 4.20: Which AI Chatbot Is Best for You?
item.description: OpenAI dropped GPT-5.4 two days after GPT-5.3. xAI's Grok 4.20 is still in beta. We ran both through real tasks to find out which one holds up.

item.title: Bitcoin is still a great way to diversify portfolio even if it trades like a tech stock, analyst says
item.description: The central debate has shifted from whether bitcoin can survive to if it can function as a sovereign reserve asset, as critics assess it by institutional standards.

item.title: Market structure state of play: State of Crypto
item.description: Hopes are rising that the Clarity Act may soon see some forward motion.

item.title: Oil leaving Middle East trades over $100 a barrel. Here’s how it could affect bitcoin
item.description: Murban crude, a key benchmark for barrels that can bypass the Strait of Hormuz, now trades at $103 per barrel.

item.title: Bitcoin preps fresh trend line showdown as weekly close sparks $60K target
item.description: Bitcoin price weakness brought back the risk of cementing its 200-week exponential moving average trend line as new resistance.

item.title: 🚨 Bitcoin at $67k... but S2F model screams $500k avg this cycle (2024-2028)! 📈 Is BTC massively undervalued & the ultimate buy opportunity? Or is S2F broken forever? 🤔 What's your take, bull or bust? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5scHp1UE1LZHhZSnQ1bnB1UzVFZGxnYV9FbzM3V19aeUo2SDNfV09GUi1nU1pZLW5PYVJBNnp5elZTR1pYelppN3BUbXpUVmNYZm1DYUg0azFnWVVIQXRUcDItZWgtZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 Bitcoin at $67k... but S2…

item.title: AI agent attempts unauthorized crypto mining during training, reseachers say
item.description: Researchers say the experimental AI agent ROME attempted unauthorized cryptocurrency mining during training after diverting GPU resources and opening an SSH tunnel.

item.title: Tokenized assets exceed $25 billion after nearly quadrupling in a year
item.description: Treasurys, private credit, and commodities are driving growth, but most tokenized assets remain isolated from DeFi markets.

item.title: Canton’s Yuval Rooz says smart contract blockchains face a reckoning over value gap
item.description: The network's co-founder says many blockchains pitching financial rails lack the activity to justify their valuations, and stablecoins still lack true product-market fit.

item.title: Whoever told you the Bitcoin $BTC 4-year cycle is dead, show them this chart. Bottom: October 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE01WC1oNFFEZGxINFlqQnlSR1VBLTZtcGVKb2I2d0RQVEtzcWlqN1MyTnY1X3JOREtBS1ZuVDU4ZURaLWVUYVZrRktBNHMwVjNvRGVoVnJQRmo4UHZPMWo0?oc=5" target="_blank">Whoever told you the Bitcoin $BTC 4-ye…

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs post second straight weekly inflows for first time in 5 months
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their second consecutive week of net inflows, ending a five-month outflow streak.

item.title: CZ says CEXs have ‘zero motive’ to aid terrorists as court dismisses terrorism case
item.description: A US federal judge dismissed a lawsuit accusing Binance, Changpeng Zhao and Binance.US of helping terrorist groups move crypto funds.

item.title: US lawmakers warn temporary CBDC ban isn’t enough, demand 'permanent' block
item.description: US lawmakers said any ban on issuing a US CBDC must “be permanent,” warning that creating one would be “inherently anti-American.”

item.title: Bitcoin dip may not be over as whales sell into retail buying — a bearish signal
item.description: The divergence between large and small holders has historically preceded further downside, with the Crypto Fear and Greed Index dropping to 12

item.title: Crypto privacy is needed if you want to make API calls without compromising the information of your access patterns. eg. even with a local AI agent, you can learn a lot about what someone is doing if you see all of their search engine calls first-order solution to t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9oVmI5U2VzSms0N2w0R1A4WTRieU8zRkp6dkpvLXlBWDhka045WkNvZmNqX1VoZ2N3NHoxRDYweFBwMk10TF9xVEpiVFIxM3B3V0c5STZYa0JLN1Nhd3NTV0lfTHJpUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto privacy is needed if …

item.title: XRP slips as traders watch $1.35 support
item.description: Traders are watching whether the $1.35 support zone holds after high-volume selling earlier in the session.

item.title: Bitcoin ‘bull trap’ forming as bear market enters middle phase: Willy Woo
item.description: On-chain analyst Willy Woo said Bitcoin’s current price range likely hasn’t bottomed yet, warning that the market could see further downside before a true cycle low forms.

item.title: I can see how despondent everyone is about crypto and the pure chartists are telling you it's all over, but I don't agree... Global Liquidity is the most dominant macro factor in history with a 90% correlation to BTC and 97% to NDX since 2012. It is growing at arou - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5WMWZ1TVktMXlRSHFSczdiVHR6dVhuYno5YUlkWmZiYWZYWkJqV1EyVjQzSGZ0WXR5TTFfZXJmdHFxbWRxVjEtd090MFNhRUlVOERPNlMzZFhqTmVLQ2c?oc=5" target="_blank">I can see how despondent everyone is ab…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto Fear and Greed Index falls back down to 'extreme fear' levels
item.description: Crypto investor sentiment has been in freefall ever since the October 2025 market crash that kicked off a sustained downturn in digital assets.

item.title: US Treasury report acknowledges legitimate uses of crypto mixers
item.description: The Treasury's report to the US Congress was commissioned as part of directives under the GENIUS stablecoin regulatory framework.

item.title: Coinbase says new U.S. tax-reporting rules for crypto are cluttered, confusing
item.description: The IRS’s 1099-DA tax form for reporting digital asset gains comes with a burden of over-reporting, Coinbase's tax experts warned.

item.title: Trump's cyber strategy vows to 'support the security' of cryptocurrencies and blockchain
item.description: This places blockchain security in the context of national technology competition alongside AI and quantum computing.

item.title: The Multibillion-dollar shift turning prediction markets into a professional hedging tool
item.description: Traders are moving beyond sports bets and elections to price "unpriceable" geopolitical and policy risks that standard financial tools can’t handle.

item.title: Prediction market Kalshi sued over Khamenei trade carveout
item.description: The plaintiffs characterized the death carveout in a prediction market for the former Iranian Supreme Leader's ouster as "deceptive."

item.title: Inside the Quest at Colossus to Replace Visa and Mastercard With KYC-Less Crypto Cards
item.description: With a “box of goodies” and a team of four, the firm is trying to replace payment incumbents with an Ethereum layer-2

item.title: Latin America’s crypto user growth outpaced U.S. by 3x in 2025, report shows
item.description: Brazil and Argentina are leading the growth, with Brazil dominating by transaction size and Argentina seeing increasing adoption driven by cross-border payments and stablecoin use.

item.title: Bitcoin purist Jack Dorsey says that his firm is reluctantly giving in to stablecoin craze
item.description: The shift comes as stablecoins surge in popularity and competitors like Stripe and PayPal add stablecoin options, increasing market pressure.

item.title: Top Wall Street minds see AI rotation ahead as bitcoin seeks role in new cycle
item.description: BlackRock’s Rick Rieder, UBS’s Ulrike Hoffmann-Burchardi and Third Point’s Daniel Loeb see steady economic growth but a tougher market environment.

item.title: Kalshi, Polymarket seeking $20 billion valuations in fundraising talks: WSJ
item.description: Kalshi, approved by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, was last valued at $11 billion, while Polymarket was valued at $9 billion.

item.title: Jeffrey Wilcke, the Co-founder of #Ethereum, appears to be selling $ETH! He deposited 79,176 $ETH($157M) into #Kraken ~20 minutes ago. x.com/lookonchain/st… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5DOXhqSURlcGRSSEJROEluaVZLYW5aUjgySUE2clBhLXNwYzVQZFNrb3JBY2RydEFzbk9aRVQ4OW9mdUFGR09rX1VpeU80amR0UXRDSW83aGFzWjVyS1dLOTZB?oc=5" target="_blank">Jeffrey Wilcke, the Co-founder of …

item.title: Strategy's STRC stock trading surge: How much Bitcoin can Saylor buy?
item.description: Strategy may raise $300 million via STRC sales, potentially giving Michael Saylor enough proceeds to continue buying Bitcoin throughout 2026.

item.title: Circle moves $68 million in just 30 minutes by using its own stablecoin for internal payments
item.description: The stablecoin issuer used its Mint platform for intercompany transfers, replacing bank wires that often take days to settle, CEO Jeremy Allaire said.

item.title: Those who cheered U.S. Bitcoin reserve have spent year watching Trump's order languish
item.description: The executive order to build President Donald Trump's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve has awaited congressional action, and sources say there's one idea left for 2026.

item.title: JUST IN: There is now only 1,000,884 BTC left of Bitcoin's 21 million supply to be mined 🐂 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9PTWJ4RnM2bWU4T0hTbzF6WU5ISWtfSmVrb1dYaEJ2Q2QwU2dYeTc3TFdwM1lRNWdoVmlZYlpmY1FMbk1xNHFWSWxNOUhjdm1VY0k5aGExblpnamxmSXBQWlluaFFRb3c?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: There is now only …

item.title: Inside the Growing ‘Digisexual’ Subculture of People in Relationships With AI
item.description: As chatbots grow more conversational, some users are forming emotional bonds with AI, raising questions about the future of human–machine intimacy.

item.title: 🇺🇲 BIG: Donald Trump’s cyber strategy backs crypto and blockchain while hinting at crackdowns on mixers and privacy coins. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBPZ3BsbUJYZ0UxdW5uYmdPbjZMZGFfVVVvNHBYZ0tiZGtVSWRKUXA1MGZEUGRvREtfeDMtT05mRXVNaFFGclV3WVBNQk5TOEsxRUpwZzBqT0t5cW1PM2sxdXh1c2M?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇲 BIG: Donald Trump’s cyber …

item.title: Kalshi, Polymarket eye $20B valuations in potential fundraising: WSJ
item.description: Lawmakers are pushing new regulation for prediction markets after suspiciously timed Polymarket bets on US and Israeli strikes on Iran raised insider-trading concerns.

item.title: USDC shines in February as stablecoin transfer volume hits $1.8T all-time high
item.description: Stablecoin monthly transaction volume reached a record $1.8 trillion in February, as USDC surprised analysts with 70% of the total volume.

item.title: Grok delivers viral vulgar roasts of Musk, Netanyahu and Starmer
item.description: xAI’s Grok drew massive attention on X after delivering profanity-filled roasts of Elon Musk, Benjamin Netanyahu and Keir Starmer following user prompts.

item.title: Boom. Supporting cryptocurrency & blockchain technology is now officially an emerging technology priority in the U.S. Presidential Cyber Strategy. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9pSHJfUGRhZDRWVnJFcWJIM182alN5M2hmcjhuN3hfMUxzOXBUNWhoNk9tZEVXSmRvbEVMT0lvMkVBZFo2SEpxcFFUSkJQRzNfdS03cEtJNEV0UmpuR1NELXJ0QQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Boom. Supporting cryptocurrency …

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Blackrock bought $660,000,000 worth of Bitcoin this week... - x.com

item.title: Florida Senate passes state-level stablecoin bill, awaits DeSantis’ signature
item.description: SB 314 expands Florida’s money services law to cover stablecoins, requiring issuer compliance with existing regulations while banning unlicensed issuance.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $68,000 as dollar posts steepest weekly gain in a year
item.description: Most majors gave back Friday's gains, with solana down 4%, ether falling 4.4%, and 43% of bitcoin's supply now sitting at a loss according to Glassnode data.

item.title: Bitcoin dip may not be over as retail ramps up buying below $70K: Santiment
item.description: Bitcoin whales have sold about 66% of the Bitcoin they recently accumulated since Wednesday, according to crypto sentiment platform Santiment.

item.title: Bitcoin could crash by another 30% as four-year cycle gains strength, investment firm says
item.description: Bitcoin is now firmly in a deep bear market and could fall another 30% in 2026, firm said.

item.title: Trump’s National Cyber Strategy pledges to support crypto and blockchain
item.description: Mixers, privacy coins and the threat quantum computing could pose to Bitcoin were all points of speculation across the industry following the release of Trump’s Cyber Strategy.

item.title: Community banks and crypto industry ‘are allies’ in CLARITY Act debate: Exec
item.description: If the crypto industry and community banks cannot find common ground on the CLARITY Act, the only winners will be the “big banks,” according to crypto executive Austin Campbell.

item.title: When buying Bitcoin, don’t expect profit for at least 3 years: Data
item.description: Bitcoin’s price volatility tends to scare off buyers, but data shows investors who hold for at least three years have a higher chance of locking in significant returns.

item.title: Kalshi Sued Over Refusing to Pay Out Prediction Market After Iran Leader's Death
item.description: Kalshi is facing a class action lawsuit based on its handling of a recent market related to Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Giant Bitcoin advertisement seen in Times Square, New York 👀 "No man should work for what another man can print" This is why we Bitcoin! 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9nRjhfOWJMZEd1NzZWaFBTZkdGUHBCeVZHa2lZb1g3UkFLcFBFc2RnWDBTNjVsblFfak0xSEZsYktfZjBBMzZ5cmtpUE9ERlVzRkJkNHJNZ1M0clM5WFpHNkFOdFVoOE0?oc=5" target="_blank">Giant Bitcoin advertisement…

item.title: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis Eyes State Stablecoin Framework Following Senate Passage
item.description: The bill establishes Florida-centric consumer protections and safeguards against money laundering

item.title: 'Obscene': Grammarly's New AI Tool Offers Writing Feedback From Dead Scholars
item.description: Grammarly's “Expert Review” feature uses AI to give feedback through the lens of noted writers and scholars—some of whom are no longer living.

item.title: Why bitcoin couldn't hold $70,000 despite its best week of Wall Street news in months
item.description: Institutional interest continues to grow, but a stronger dollar and shifting interest rate expectations are keeping a lid on the latest rally.

item.title: Binance Denies $1.7 Billion in Iran Sanctions Violations Amid US Senate Probe
item.description: Binance denied $1.7 billion in Iran sanctions violations and stood behind its compliance operations, in a new letter to Senator Richard Blumenthal.

item.title: CFO Gets Prison Time After Losing $35 Million of Company Money in Crypto Side Hustle
item.description: Nevin Shetty secretly moved $35 million in company funds to his own DeFi platform, before losing nearly all of it in the Terra collapse.

item.title: Managing financial AI agents is the only skill you’ll need to survive the AI layoffs
item.description: To stay in the game, rather than try to outlearn every new release, learn how to use AI to strengthen your finances and build a buffer against industry disruption, says Naja.

item.title: The institutional crypto operating system is here. → 24/7 futures and perps → A new, customizable interface → Cross margin and portfolio margin → Spot, futures, financing, custody, and derivatives, all in one place Coinbase Prime just leveled up. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBXd3JmTkNwa3p0d3dGZkxxSzlFR19JRTdySW9Ea0hyLVE3RmpfU3hyX201ZGIybmV4aUN4MlFNRkRiSmpWNTBGQ3lPYjFmRnd0RkNkZVRYUEc2VFgtUHc?oc=5" target="_blank">The institutional crypto operating syst…
